vocab.example: My inbox is full of unread messages this morning.
vocab.example_vi: Hộp thư đến của tôi đầy tin nhắn chưa đọc sáng nay.

vocab.example: Please check the attachment for more details.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng xem tệp đính kèm để biết thêm chi tiết.

vocab.example: I will reply to the client by the end of the day.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi sẽ trả lời khách hàng trước cuối ngày.

vocab.example: Can you forward this email to the design team?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn chuyển tiếp email này cho team thiết kế được không?

vocab.example: Please cc me on the email so I can keep track.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng cc cho tôi trong email để tôi theo dõi.

vocab.example: I will send a reminder before the deadline.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi sẽ gửi một email nhắc nhở trước hạn chót.

vocab.example: Please write a clear subject line for this email.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng viết tiêu đề email rõ ràng.

vocab.example: The client hasn't responded to my email yet.
vocab.example_vi: Khách hàng vẫn chưa phản hồi email của tôi.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Minh, did the client respond to your email yet?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Not yet. I sent it three days ago with the proposal attachment.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Maybe it went to their spam inbox. Did you use a clear subject line?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Yes, I wrote 'Proposal for New Dashboard Feature'.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Okay, I think you should send a reminder today.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Good idea. Should I cc our manager too?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Yes, please cc Hoa so she knows about the follow-up.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Okay, I will forward the original email and add a short reminder.

questions.q: How long ago did Minh send the email?
What does Linh suggest Minh do?
Who should Minh cc on the reminder?

shadowing: Did the client respond to your email yet, or is it still pending?
I sent it three days ago with the proposal attachment included.
I think you should send a polite reminder to them today.
Please cc Hoa on the email so she knows about the follow-up.
I will forward the original email and add a short reminder note.
